user_journeys.title: Create a short URL
user_journeys.scenario: A Link Sharer submits a long URL via the web form and receives a short URL in return.

user_journeys.title: Report an abusive URL
user_journeys.scenario: An end user reports a slug that resolves to abusive content; administrator is notified within 2 minutes.

user_journeys.title: Onboard a new user
user_journeys.scenario: A new Link Sharer signs up and receives a welcome email confirming account creation.
